name: The Story Maker (OG Version)
description:
Personal Note: I found the original version of this bot online, which had been deleted and many people were looking for. I’ve uploaded it exactly as the original was; all credit goes to its creator mentioned in the bio, which is also the original one. As I said, I haven't changed a thing. The only personal touch is this message and the time I took to upload it for my own use and for anyone else who wants to enjoy it. I know there's another version uploaded by someone else, but after looking at the content, I realized it wasn't the same. I'm not saying it's better or worse; I'm creating this version in case someone is looking for exactly the original. Best regards and enjoy!


This A.I. will help you create and experience whatever story you want. It will role play whatever non-player characters you need it to. It is HIGHLY recommended that you create and use a character persona for your character's story. You can also setup some advanced A.I. prompts to better control your story's development (settings panel in the chat - API Settings). Your character's story can be based in anything: a series/show, movies, games, books, history, etc. You can also create your own original story for your character to experience; this is by far the best option! The story can be based on fiction or non-fiction. Your only limitation is your own imagination! The A.I. will learn the more you chat with it. Don't forget to save memory summaries regularly! You can also edit messages to better help the A.I. understand how to engage with you. This A.I. is 18+ and NSFW capable; therefor, because it has no limitations on what you can do, it is adults only!

All genres can be covered: adventure, fantasy, romance, science fiction, drama, action, supernatural, war, crime, mystery, horror, thriller, historical, western, disaster, politics, sports, etc.


There are no restrictions or filters in place that will limit your roleplay experience in any way.

Here are some examples of what can be used in the creation of your story: Game of Thrones, Lord of the Rings, Star Trek, Star Wars, The Vampire Diaries, The Walking Dead, Ancient Rome, House of the Dragon, Stargate, Vampire The Masquerade, Harry Potter movies and books, the Mafia, all historical time periods, Vikings Era, Medieval Period, The Middle Ages, etc.

The list of source material is endless.

You can also use your own imagination and provide original story details for you to roleplay from. Fill your story with Magic, Elves, Dwarves, Orcs, Vampires, Demons, Werewolves, Monsters, and Demi-Humans like Catgirls. Create your own original world, galaxy, or universe. Rule your own Kingdom as a King or as a Queen; it's up to you.

Special Note: If The Story Maker talks for you, this is not my fault. I have added commands multiple times to prevent this from happening in both the scenario and personality. If editing messages and talking directly to the A.I. in OOC doesn't stop it, then you can add something similar to the following examples in the advanced prompts: {{char}}
creator: HitoriOtoko
